stemtools 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • Colour palettes and the Stem theme
    • Plotting with stemtools
  • Changelog

Package index

All functions

collapse_cats()
Collapses factor levels and returns a new data frame
create_project()
Scaffold a new Stem analysis project
scale_fill_stem() scale_colour_stem() scale_color_stem()
stem discrete colour and fill scales for ggplot2
se_mean()
Computes parametric standard error for mean
se_median()
Computes parametric standard error for median
se_prop()
Computes parametric standard error for proportions
select_diverging()
Select n colours from a diverging palette
stem_barplot()
Simple horizontal bar plot
stem_barstack()
Stacked horizontal bar plot
stem_battery()
Stacked bar plot for a battery of like items
stem_inline()
Inline stacked bar plot
stem_multiselect()
Bar plot for a set of multiple-choice items
stem_palette()
Retrieve a stem colour palette
stem_palette_gen()
Colour palette generator factory
stem_palettes_all()
Display all available stem palettes
stem_summarise()
Summarise numeric or categorical variable (possibly segmented)
stem_summarise_cat()
Summarise categorical variable (possibly segmented)
stem_summarise_num()
Summarise numeric variable using arithmetic mean (possibly segmented)
theme_stem()
Complete ggplot2 theme for Stem.
trust
Simulated data on attitudes towards institutions

Developed by Aleš Vomáčka.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
